positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    roderick_strong != ivy_nile).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    diamond_mine != ivy_nile).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    diamond_mine != roderick_strong).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    diamond_mine != imperium).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    diamond_mine != creed_brothers).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    creed_brothers != imperium).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ivy_nile != imperium).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    roderick_strong != imperium).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    creed_brothers != ivy_nile).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    roderick_strong != creed_brothers).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define stable(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define leads(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define includes(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_feud(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg
% SZS output start Proof for neg
2. stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. includes(diamond_mine,creed_brothers) & includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(axiom)]
5. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & has_feud(imperium,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & has_feud(imperium,X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
9. ! [X0] : (~stable(X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~has_feud(imperium,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
20. stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 2]
21. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 4]
23. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
24. ~has_feud(imperium,X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~stable(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
25. ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) | ~stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 23,24]
26. ~stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 25,21]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,20]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
